description: Reference gate-signal expectations for the DP8.1 signal-collection matrix (WORKER-003). Each scenario records the story configuration and the expected {ok, blocked_reason} signal set the gate worker is handed, plus the expected action per DP2.
dp_note: DP2 spawn boundary: judged gates (schema, auth) trip spawn-gate-worker; mechanical gate (stub) trips await-user directly without spawning a worker; all-clean trips spawn-builder.

scenarios.label: auth-gated-no-classification
scenarios.dp2_note: auth is a judged gate — tripped without classification → spawn-gate-worker (no worker bypass)

scenarios.label: auth-gated-with-classification
scenarios.dp2_note: classification present → auth gate passes → all clean → spawn-builder (Row 2)

scenarios.label: schema-introduces-no-exception
scenarios.dp2_note: schema is a judged gate — no mgmt story or exception → spawn-gate-worker

scenarios.label: schema-introduces-with-exception
scenarios.dp2_note: exception phrase in body → schema gate passes → all clean → spawn-builder (Row 2)

scenarios.label: stub-story
scenarios.dp2_note: stub is mechanical — tripped → await-user directly, no gate worker spawned

golden_evals_note: Non-gating golden eval fixtures (story + signals → expected verdict) are deliberately omitted from this file to avoid gating the build on LLM judgment. Judgment quality is validated by the worker procedure prompt + manual review (DP8.2).
